Our hand-selected ingredients are evidence-based

Our dedicated team of scientists meticulously handpick each ingredient for our Precision Supplements™ portfolio of over 200 ingredients, adhering to rigorous standards for quality and purity. Committed to quality and transparency [...] Start with My Test

Your unique dosage

Because one-size-fits-all supplements and multivitamins are designed for the average person’s needs, they may not provide meaningful dosages for your health needs. Our potent formulas are specifically designed to deliver highly concentrated doses of your supplement ingredients in an affordable and convenient way. When determining your specific dose, we consider your Viome health scores, clinical trial dosages, and life stage. Our Precision Supplements™ aren't just supplements; they are super-nutrients specifically crafted to address your unique health needs, going beyond the capabilities of traditional products.

Pause or choose another delivery date anytime through your account!

CLIA Certified Lab

Your privacy is secure [...] AI-powered Precision

We harness the power of AI to make your supplements smarter. Our technology incorporates your Viome health scores, thousands of clinical studies, and hundreds of Viome algorithms to pick out the nutrients that will benefit your body the most.

Ingredients With Intention

It can be hard to get what your body needs from food alone. Our Precision Supplements™ deliver a concentrated dosage of powerful ingredients to ensure you get the proper amount. When considering how much you need of a particular ingredient, we consider the dosages used in clinical trials, the severity of your suboptimal scores, and your stage of life.

A “Living” Formula That Transforms [...] Committed to quality and transparency

Registered Facility

Registered Facility

Premium Ingredients

Our team of scientists carefully selects ingredients for our Precision Supplements™ portfolio, which are vegetarian, vegan (when available), non-GMO, allergen-free, void of 9 major allergens: dairy, wheat, eggs, soy, shellfish, fish, tree nuts (including coconut and peanuts) and sesame, and contain minimal excipients. Rest assured, our products are free from dubious additives, including synthetic fillers, artificial colors, mercury, or partially-hydrogenated soybean oil.

Probiotic Strain Validation

Our probiotic strains are hand selected by our scientists based on extensive clinical data generated at academic and research institutions. Each strain is assessed for efficacy and viability to ensure survivability to bypass the acidic environment of the stomach and for product to remain shelf stable- no refrigeration necessary!

Do you test for every ingredient? [...] Do you test for every ingredient?

A targeted blend of probiotics and prebiotics, personalized by your Viome Gut Health scores

Choosing the right probiotics and prebiotics for your digestive health isn't just about quantity. In fact, two people can have opposite reactions to a probiotic due to the differences in every gut microbiome. Our Gut Intelligence Test is the only gut test in the world that can analyze the specific activity of the microbes in your gut and how they impact your health, allowing us to determine the right probiotic strains and prebiotic fibers for your unique gut environment!

Before we blend, we test [...] Bacillus clausii CSI08

Probiotic

Benefits:

Healthy weight\Boost gut diversity\Support blood sugar metabolism\Suppress harmful gut bacteria\

Bacillus clausii CSI08 is a probiotic that can help support the stability of the gut microbial environment. This bacterial strain is particularly effective in helping to reduce the prevalence of occasional diarrhea. In addition, scientists have shown it can be incredibly resilient in colonizing the gut and is a great friend to our immune system by boosting antioxidant activity and promoting healthy gut flora.\

Partially Hydrolyzed Guar Gum

Prebiotic

Benefits:

Healthy weight\Boost gut diversity\Support blood sugar metabolism\Suppress harmful gut bacteria\ [...] Populating your gut with powerful probiotics

Your lozenges dissolve in your mouth like a breath mint to deliver 30 billion CFU of beneficial bacteria and other powerful, personalized ingredients tailored to your needs. These ingredients are formulated to help bring your oral microbiome back into balance, protect your teeth and gums from harmful microbial activity, support your immune system, and promote overall health throughout your body.\

A formula that can change with you

We understand that your health needs evolve over time. That's why when you retest, your lozenge formula may be updated to adapt alongside you. As your health progresses, we’ll ensure your formula continually meets your evolving needs, helping you stay on your journey toward peak wellness. [...] Skin irritation support\Mood support\Gut lining support\

Lactobacillus rhamnosus, found in many fermented foods and drinks, has been linked to being beneficial on pathways affecting the Hypothalamic-Pituitary-Adrenal-axis and mood/behavioral health. L. rhamnosus GG has also shown it can help to stabilize the gut, defend against skin irritations and GI discomfort, and even improve cellular health along the intestinal lining.\

B. breve Bb-03

Probiotic

Benefits:

Healthy weight\Boost gut diversity\Support blood sugar metabolism\Suppress harmful gut bacteria\

Bifidobacterium breve Bb-03 is an effective helper in aiding against pathogenic bacteria from colonizing the gut. B. breve Bb-03 may also help reduce body fat and support healthy blood sugar metabolism.\

Bacillus clausii CSI08

results.title: Viome Oral Lozenges | Personalized Prebiotic, Probiotic + Postbiotic
results.raw_content:
Probiotic

Benefits:

Breath support\

L. brevis has been found to be effective against bacteria coating that tongue that can lend to bad breath.\ Certain metabolites of these bacteria can create strong, odorous smells. L. brevis can help reduce the formation of these odorous metabolites.

KT-11™ (Lactobacillus crispatus)

Probiotic

Benefits:

Decrease plaque formation\
Immune response support\
Promote balance\

Lactobacillus crispatus KT-11 is a heat-sterilized bacterial strain (postbiotic) that promotes a healthy mouth. Heat sterilized bacteria help support healthy immune responses in the body and can have beneficial attributes such as decreasing plaque, and lessening the impact of an overactive immune response.

Probiotic

Promote beneficial bacteria\
Neutralizes oral pH\

Known for supporting healthy teeth and gums, S. salivarius M18 is able to produce a unique combination of the enzymes urease and dextranase that neutralizes oral pH. S. salivarius is a commensal strain that supports the growth of beneficial bacteria in the mouth. It is one of the most dominant species found in the oral cavity and substantial research links S. salivarius with good oral health.

results.raw_content:
Dentists notice improvements

Beautiful gums

Less staining

Fresh breath

Sunrise

Cleanse & Restore

Toothgel

Remove plaque and improve gum health on a molecular level

Removes plaque up to 250% better than leading toothpaste brands†

Reduces gum redness and puffiness up to 250% better than leading brands†

Our innovative gel works on a molecular level, breaking the bonds between plaque and teeth, unlike traditional toothpastes that rely on harsh abrasives. By using a synergistic blend of Methylsulfonylmethane (MSM) and Sodium Tripolyphosphate (STPP), our gel not only removes existing plaque but also forms a protective barrier that repels bacteria and prevents new plaque from attaching to your teeth.

results.title: CancerDetect® Oral Cancer Test Kit & Throat Cancer Test at Home ...
results.raw_content:
Test at home for peace of mind

Viome Discovery™

# CancerDetect Test

for Oral & Throat Cancer

CancerDetect® Oral & Throat is the first at-home test of its kind to detect biomarkers associated with early-stage oral and throat cancer. This simple-to-use yet revolutionary test takes only a few minutes to collect and mail a sample and includes healthcare provider guidance when needed. Eligible individuals can now test with the confidence of high accuracy to detect biomarkers associated with oral and/or throat cancer.

 Detect biomarkers associated with early-stage oral & throat cancers
 Substantially higher sensitivity and specificity over conventional oral exam \
 Easy-to-use at-home test and guided experience
 Healthcare provider consultation is available when needed [...] ### 5

Expect your result within 4 weeks: after a healthcare provider from our partner, PWNHealth, reviews your analysis, a printable report (PDF) will be available on my.viome.com. If molecular features are detected, the same provider will call you to guide you through your report.

 Your test includes everything required to collect and mail your saliva sample
 Your test includes detailed instructions to guide your testing experience
 No changes to your diet or medication is necessary
 Your test is delivered right to your home
 Minimum preparation required

Steps To Test Collection VideoDownload instructions

Complete the eligibility form and follow simple steps to order your test. A healthcare provider will review your test request in 48 hours.

### Measures [...] Currently, oral cancer is hard to detect in the early stages because of the lack of effective early diagnostic tools, resulting in late diagnosis, leading to poor prognosis and low survival rates.

The performance characteristics of visual screening are operator-dependent, with sensitivity ranging from 25% to 100%, with the study most generalizable to the United States demonstrating a sensitivity of 74%.¹¹

### A digital report that you can print and review your results [...] The result will not be shared directly with your doctor. Your analysis will be reviewed by a healthcare provider licensed in your state, and delivered digitally in a printable form (PDF) through your account on our secure platform, which you can share with your doctor.

If molecular features are detected, you will receive a call from the same healthcare provider who reviews your analysis. You could also receive the hard copy via certified mail if the provider could not reach you for consultation.
